subtitle.translate: The Wither Storm has been visible for ten thousand blocks. You have been walking toward it this whole time.

description: The Wither Storm (Cracker's Wither Storm mod) Craft the Command block.
It has been visible for 10,000 blocks since early game.
It absorbs blocks and mobs as you approach.
Every chapter, it has been growing.
It is their last act. Their final warning.
You have been walking toward it since Ch01.
Banishing Chains seal the Manifestor — the Scarlet King.
They summon from the Scarlet King manifesting in the world.
You need them before approaching the Manifestor at 100+ Manifestation.
→ Craft the Command Block and observe the Wither Storm [check]
